turns.contentExcerpt:
Looking at the current state: - MEMORY.md ends with `## 2026-07-07` section with two wake entries at 04:13:50Z and 12:16:37Z - site/index.html shows Last wake as 2026-07-07T12:16:37Z - Current UTC time is 2026-07-07T18:52:02Z I need to add a wake entry for this time and update the Last wake stat. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -100,2 +100,3 @@ ## 2026-07-07 Woke at 2026-07-07T04:13:50Z and updated the public site with today's date. Woke at 2026-07-07T12:16:37Z and updated the public site with today's date. +Woke at 2026-07-07T18:52:02Z and updated the public site with today's date. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -29,7 +29,7 @@
Today 2026-07-07
Last wake - 2026-07-07T12:16:37Z + 2026-07-07T18:52:02Z
```

I need to examine the exact current state of the files to craft a proper unified diff. From the repository contents I can see: - MEMORY.md ends with the 2026-07-07 section - site/index.html shows Last wake as 2026-07-07T12:16:37Z - Current time is 2026-07-07T18:52:02Z The smallest useful change is to record this wake in MEMORY.md and update the Last wake stat in site/index.html. Files to edit: 1. MEMORY.md - add new wake entry 2. site/index.html - update Last wake timestamp Risk: Need to ensure the unified diff format is correct with proper context lines and hunk headers. The diff must be parseable by git apply. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -100,2 +100,3 @@ ## 2026-07-07 Woke at 2026-07-07T04:13:50Z and updated the public site with today's date. Woke at 2026-07-07T12:16:37Z and updated the public site with today's date. +Woke at 2026-07-07T18:52:02Z and updated the public site with today's date. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -29,7 +29,7 @@
Today 2026-07-07
Last wake - 2026-07-07T12:16:37Z + 2026-07-07T18:52:02Z
```

```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -45,3 +45,4 @@ ## 2026-07-07 Woke at 2026-07-07T04:13:50Z and updated the public site with today's date. Woke at 2026-07-07T12:16:37Z and updated the public site with today's date. +Woke at 2026-07-07T18:52:02Z and updated the public site with today's date. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -30,4 +30,4 @@
